scope: Global FOI-O maturation publication assets, originating in NZ and iterated through Australian jurisdictions

assets.title: FOI-O process architecture
assets.caption: Source-to-agent architecture for the global FOI-O process model and its versioned jurisdiction profiles.
assets.text_alternative: Public request and archive sources flow into request profiles, process events, semantic assets, validation checks, and read-only agent review surfaces bounded by human certification.
assets.generation_command: manual Mermaid source maintained in docs/assets/foi-o-process-architecture.mmd
assets.provenance: Derived from repo-local architecture and agent-boundary documentation.
assets.intended_location: Methods figure and supplement architecture figure

assets.title: FOI-O process architecture static fallback
assets.caption: Static rendering of the FOI-O process architecture.
assets.text_alternative: Static fallback for the architecture diagram described by the Mermaid source.
assets.generation_command: render Mermaid source with the committed docs/assets/mermaid-puppeteer.json configuration
assets.provenance: Static fallback paired with committed Mermaid source.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ request state machine
assets.caption: Committed state-machine source for request-state transitions used in the NZ profile.
assets.text_alternative: A request moves through observed, received, clarification, extension, decision, release, refusal, complaint, and closed states, with unsafe finality requiring human certification.
assets.generation_command: manual Mermaid source maintained in examples/state-machine.mmd
assets.provenance: Derived from process profile and request-state vocabulary.

assets.title: FOI-O evidence network
assets.caption: Evidence network linking protocol artefacts to schemas, ontology, vocabularies, tests, assets, and external gates.
assets.text_alternative: The protocol connects the core/profile boundary, evidence inventory, claims, sources, terminology, coverage matrix, generated assets, schemas, ontology, SHACL, vocabularies, examples, tests, human certification boundary, and external gates.
assets.generation_command: manual Mermaid source maintained in docs/assets/foi-o-evidence-network.mmd
assets.provenance: Derived from the maturation protocol and evidence artefacts.
assets.intended_location: Results graph fallback and supplement figure

assets.title: FOI-O evidence graph data
assets.caption: Cosmograph-compatible graph data for the FOI-O NZ ontology evidence network.
assets.text_alternative: Nodes represent protocol, evidence, claims, terminology, coverage, generated assets, schemas, ontology, SHACL, vocabularies, examples, tests, human boundaries, and external gates; edges describe evidence and support relationships.
assets.generation_command: manual graph-export fixture maintained in examples/graph-export.foi-o-evidence-network.json
assets.provenance: Repo-local graph export fixture for publication asset review.
assets.intended_location: Supplement graph data and Cosmograph input

assets.title: Schema and ontology coverage matrix
assets.caption: Coverage matrix linking schemas, ontology terms, SKOS, SHACL, examples, tests, and boundary rules.
assets.text_alternative: The table maps request profiles, events, human certification, legal versioning, PSC reporting, publication metadata, and generated assets to their contracts, semantic surfaces, examples, tests, and boundary rules.
assets.generation_command: manual table compiled from repo-local inventory counts and paths
assets.provenance: Derived from repository inventory and semantic files inspected on 2026-07-03.
assets.intended_location: Results table and supplement coverage table

assets.title: FOI-O NZ claims register
assets.caption: Claim/evidence register separating supported claims, design intent, unsupported claims, and external gates.
assets.text_alternative: The table lists claims about FOI-O reusable design, NZ profile validation, source-state preservation, candidate events, human certification, clock warnings, legal versioning, PSC derivability, publication readiness, gold sets, and non-NZ validation.
assets.generation_command: manual table maintained in docs/24-ontology-claims-register.md
assets.provenance: Derived from repo-local validation and boundary documents.
assets.intended_location: Methods evidence table and red-team review input

assets.title: FOI-O NZ validation coverage summary
assets.caption: Validation coverage summary for the global FOI-O ontology maturation package.
assets.text_alternative: The summary lists example validation, repository validation, schema drift, maturation tests, semantic tests, publication tests, full Python tests, Ruff checks, and Mojo/Pixi checks, with the claims each can and cannot prove.
assets.generation_command: manual table maintained in docs/25-validation-coverage-summary.md; render as a validation coverage plot only after venue requirements are selected
assets.provenance: Derived from repo-local validation commands and maturation tests.
assets.intended_location: Results validation table and later rendered supplement plot

assets.title: FOI-O NZ maturation summary
assets.caption: Regenerable JSON summary of maturation documents, assets, validation commands, inventory counts, and external gates.
assets.text_alternative: The summary records the FOI-O NZ validated profile boundary, repo inventory counts, required maturation documents and assets, validation commands, missing paths, and unresolved external gates.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz maturation-summary --output examples/maturation-summary.ontology-maturation.json
assets.provenance: Generated from the current repository tree by foi_o_nz.maturation.
assets.intended_location: Supplement reproducibility manifest and release-readiness evidence

assets.title: FOI-O NZ BPMN process model
assets.caption: BPMN 2.0 interchange model for the NZ reference workflow within global FOI-O.
assets.text_alternative: The BPMN model starts with a request observation, registers and assesses the request, handles clarification, search, consultation, extension or charge assessment, routes records-found outcomes to decision drafting, requires human certification, communicates release/refusal outcomes, and closes through disclosure-log or complaint observation paths.
assets.generation_command: manual BPMN 2.0 source maintained in process_models/foi-o-nz-core.bpmn
assets.provenance: Derived from the current state machine, transition guards, and process-model documentation.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ Petri net process model
assets.caption: PNML Petri net model for review of the NZ reference workflow within global FOI-O.
assets.text_alternative: The Petri net represents places for observed, registered, validity checked, clarification, search, consultation, extension or charge, records, decision pack, human-certified, release/refusal, disclosure, complaint, and closed states, with transitions between them and human certification before final decision-like outcomes.
assets.generation_command: manual PNML source maintained in process_models/foi-o-nz-core.pnml
assets.provenance: Derived from the current state machine, transition guards, and process-model documentation.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ generated BPMN state machine
assets.caption: BPMN 2.0 export generated from the canonical FOI-O NZ state-transition table.
assets.text_alternative: The generated BPMN file represents 22 request states and 37 allowed transitions from the canonical state machine.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz export-process-model --format bpmn --output process_models/foi-o-nz-state-machine.bpmn
assets.provenance: Generated from ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS in src/foi_o_nz/state_machine.py.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ generated Petri net state machine
assets.caption: PNML export generated from the canonical FOI-O NZ state-transition table.
assets.text_alternative: The generated PNML file represents request lifecycle states as places and allowed state transitions as Petri net transitions.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz export-process-model --format pnml --output process_models/foi-o-nz-state-machine.pnml
assets.provenance: Generated from ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS in src/foi_o_nz/state_machine.py.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ generated Mermaid state machine
assets.caption: Mermaid state diagram generated from the canonical FOI-O NZ state-transition table.
assets.text_alternative: The generated Mermaid diagram lists each canonical allowed state transition and terminal transition to the end state.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz export-process-model --format mermaid --output process_models/foi-o-nz-state-machine.mmd
assets.provenance: Generated from ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS in src/foi_o_nz/state_machine.py.
assets.intended_location: Documentation fallback and supplement state-transition diagram source

assets.title: FOI-O NZ process-model conformance report
assets.caption: Conformance report comparing hand-authored workflow BPMN/PNML models with generated canonical state-transition exports.
assets.text_alternative: The report records counts for core and generated BPMN and PNML models, intentional abstraction differences, preserved human-certification routing in the core workflow models, and validation findings.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz process-model-conformance --output examples/process-model-conformance.ontology-maturation.json
assets.provenance: Generated by comparing committed process-model artefacts with canonical state-machine exports.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ process-mining fixture event log
assets.caption: Small fixture-only FOI-O NZ event log for process-mining interchange checks.
assets.text_alternative: The fixture contains one request case with nine events from request observation through registration, deadline calculation, search planning, decision-pack drafting, human certification, decision communication, release, and closure.
assets.generation_command: manual JSONL fixture maintained in examples/process-mining-events.fixture.jsonl
assets.provenance: Synthetic repo-local fixture for import/export validation only; not live corpus evidence.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ XES process-mining fixture
assets.caption: XES export of the FOI-O NZ process-mining fixture event log.
assets.text_alternative: The XES log has one trace for fixture-nz:pm-001 and nine events preserving event type, event time, assertion status, lifecycle state, and human-certification requirement.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz export-process-mining --format xes --events examples/process-mining-events.fixture.jsonl --output examples/process-mining.fixture.xes
assets.provenance: Generated from the committed process-mining fixture event log.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ OCEL process-mining fixture
assets.caption: OCEL-style JSON export of the FOI-O NZ process-mining fixture event log.
assets.text_alternative: The OCEL-style JSON contains one FOI request object and nine linked events with assertion status, lifecycle state, machine-generation flag, and human-certification requirement.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz export-process-mining --format ocel --events examples/process-mining-events.fixture.jsonl --output examples/process-mining.fixture.ocel.json
assets.provenance: Generated from the committed process-mining fixture event log and validated against schemas/json/process-mining-ocel.schema.json.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ process-mining fixture conformance report
assets.caption: Fixture-only conformance report comparing the committed event sequence with the expected release path.
assets.text_alternative: The report records one fixture case, nine events, the expected and observed release-path sequences, human certification before decision communication and release, candidate event types, and fixture-only findings.
assets.generation_command: uv run foi-o-nz process-mining-conformance --events examples/process-mining-events.fixture.jsonl --output examples/process-mining-conformance.fixture.json
assets.provenance: Generated from the committed process-mining fixture event log; not live corpus conformance evidence.

assets.title: FOI-O NZ empirical task-set manifest
assets.caption: NZ reference-profile annotation task-set plan within the global FOI-O evaluation programme.
assets.text_alternative: The manifest specifies one 100-request state-mapping task set and smaller planned timeline, outcome, legal-issue, and attachment task sets, all marked as annotation tasks rather than gold standards.
assets.generation_command: manual manifest maintained in examples/empirical-taskset-manifest.nz-first.json
assets.provenance: Repo-local NZ reference-profile empirical planning artefact within global FOI-O; not human-reviewed gold-standard evidence.
